questionHtml: Explain, with reference to the thermal properties of water, how this experiment helps demonstrate how humans respond to overheating.
markschemeHtml:
a. water has a high latent heat/high heat of vaporization

b. energy required to evaporate water «from the tissue paper»

c. evaporation of water leads to cooling

d. sweat produced by skin in response to heat

e. «evaporation of» sweat cools the body

Do not accept specific heat

[Max 3 Marks]

meta.title: Explain, with reference to the thermal properties of water, how this experiment helps demonstrate how humans respond to overheating.
